How To Use InheritX

Follow these steps to get the most out of your digital inheritance platform.

Step 1: Go to Inheritance Plans

Navigate to the "Inheritance Plans" section on your dashboard.

Step 2: Select Plan Type

Choose the type of plan you want to create:

  • Single Beneficiary Plan — one person receives the assets.
  • Multiple Beneficiary Plan — split assets across several people with chosen percentages.

Step 3: Add Beneficiaries

Enter names, contact details, and wallet addresses for each beneficiary.

Step 4: Define Rules & Conditions

Set rules such as conditions for release (e.g., claim code or disbursment settings).

Step 5: Save & Activate

Review all details and confirm. Your inheritance plan is now active and will work based on the conditions you've set.
